rationale: This is an epic bead with no acceptance criteria of its own — children cover individual component surfaces. The diff under review only contains execution evidence artifacts (manifest.json, result.json) for a successful execution attempt; the actual token-class sweep work landed in the prior commit c9a044f3 ("apply token classes to CommandPalette, D3Graph, IntegrityPanel"). With no AC to evaluate against and execution recorded as `task_succeeded`, this passes by default.
